name: Micro Beat
explanation: A tiny budget analog drum box in the Boss DR-110 lineage — distinct from the factory's bigger drum machines by a thin, clicky, bright character: a short clicky kick, a papery snare, sizzly 'tssh' hats and a thin clap/cymbal, all synthesised in real time. A MIDI note selects a voice (note % 5) into a 6-slot pool. Controls: Pitch, Decay, Click (attack snap), Hat (brightness/length), Accent and Level.
